Affiliate Disclosure

Transparency is important to us. Fairly Odd Streamers participates in affiliate programs and may earn commissions from products and services recommended on this site.

How It Works

When you click on a sponsorship or tool link on our site and make a purchase, we may earn a commission. This doesn't cost you anything extra — the price you pay remains the same. We only recommend products and services we believe are valuable for streamers.

Our Commitment

  • We only recommend tools and sponsorships we genuinely believe in
  • We clearly mark affiliate links where applicable
  • Affiliate relationships never influence our editorial content
  • We regularly review all recommendations for quality and relevance
  • Your trust is more important to us than any commission

FTC Disclosure

As required by the Federal Trade Commission (FTC), we disclose that Fairly Odd Streamers is a participant in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program and other affiliate advertising programs designed to provide a means for sites to earn advertising fees by advertising and linking to their products.

Questions?

If you have any questions about our affiliate practices or recommendations, please get in touch.

About FOS

Fairly Odd Streamers is a resource hub for livestreamers with curated sponsorships, tools, and insights.
